features.name: Channel Divinity
features.description: At 2nd level, you gain the ability to channel divine energy directly from your deity...

features.name: Additional Channel Divinity Effects
features.description: Beginning at 6th level, you can use your Channel Divinity twice between rests...

features.name: Channel Divinity Twice
features.description: Beginning at 8th level, you can use your Channel Divinity once per short or long rest.
